red_herring.value: UFO abduction theories and paranormal explanations presented as potential causes for the strange dream experiences
red_herring.quote: UFO buffs who theorized about a link between vivid dreams and alien abductions

clue_fairness.value: Reader learns about lucid dreaming research alongside protagonist through web search results
clue_fairness.quote: she typed the words that had been skulking into her mind all day. Lucid dreaming.

social_world.value: College student social hierarchy with casual relationships and academic pressures
social_world.quote: Fellow sociology major Jamie, who was sprawled across the only armchair

media_and_audience.value: Research literature and online sources frame lucid dreaming through various perspectives from psychiatric to paranormal
media_and_audience.quote: research had been done on the subject, by everyone from psychiatrists to paranormal investigators

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's vulnerability to isolation and fear, particularly around the unsettling neighbor Mr. Phillips
investigator_wound.quote: Made certain every lock, bolt and chain was ever so securely fastened
